base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of goomba_walk — a character (minion) from 1985 super mario bros. 2-frame walk cycle alternating left-foot-forward and right-foot-forward. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame walk cycle alternating left-foot-forward and right-foot-forward; the iconic walking-mushroom gait
